channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Maintaining compliance in government agencies with rich text editors
item.description: Learn how rich text editors help government agencies ensure compliance with data security, accessibility, and document standardization. The post Maintaining compliance in government agencies with rich text editors first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: New York state government to monitor its use of AI under a new law
item.description: ALBANY, N.Y. (AP) — New York state government agencies will have to conduct reviews and publish reports that detail how they're using artificial intelligence software, under a new law signed by Gov. Kathy Hochul.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The second shoe is about to drop on a big DoD cybersecurity program
item.description: The DoD's big cybersecurity program advanced earlier this month. It's a big rule to carry out if it becomes effective. The post The second shoe is about to drop on a big DoD cybersecurity program first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: People who visit adult or gambling websites double their risk of malware
item.description: Visiting adult and gambling websites doubles the risk of inadvertently installing malware onto work devices, according to a new study. Fabio Massacci at the University of Trento and Vrije University in Amsterdam presented the findings of a massive analysis of real-life data from around the world.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: Trump says Bill Gates asked to visit Mar-a-Lago
item.description: President-elect Trump said Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates asked to visit his Florida resort Mar-a-Lago on Friday night. "Where are you? When are you coming to the 'Center of the Universe,' Mar-a-Lago. Bill Gates asked to come, tonight," Trump wrote in a Friday morning Truth Social post.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Mexico tests cellphone app allowing migrants to send alert if they are about to be detained in US
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — Mexico is developing a cellphone app that will allow migrants to warn relatives and local consulates if they think they are about to be detained by the U.S. immigration department, a senior official said Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Musk stirs pot on X over 'shortage' of talented American engineers
item.description: Musk, an immigrant from South Africa, posted to X that there is a shortage of "talented" engineers in the U.S. and companies should start looking to other countries.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: Pedal Ahead founder is out as California e-bike program operator, but questions and reporting discrepancies persist
item.description: The nonprofit was the subject of a criminal investigation earlier this year and a civil probe by the Air Resources Board, according to records.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Mcdonald, The Mercury News

item.title: AI-powered robot sinks seemingly impossible basketball hoops
item.description: A humanoid robot named CUE6 has got game. The basketball-playing robot, produced by Toyota, claimed a Guinness World Record for longest shot.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sign PDFs easily in Preview on Apple devices
item.description: With electronic signatures becoming more common, Kurt the CyberGuy explains how to produce your digital John Hancock for online documents.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 15 tech luminaries we lost in 2024
item.description: The computing industry was founded with mainframes intended for the few. Bringing computers to the masses was the work of generations, such as the trailblazers we honor in this story.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The Special Olympics embarks on digital journey to empower its athletes
item.description: The Special Olympics is overhauling its technology stack as part of a digital transformation designed to bolster the training of its athletes across the globe.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: What is data governance? Frameworks, tools, and best practices to manage data assets
item.description: Data governance definition Data governance is a system to define who within an organization has authority and control over data assets, and how those data assets may be used. It encompasses the people, processes, and technologies required to manage and protect data assets.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Got new electronics for the holidays? Here's what to do first
item.description: Kurt the CyberGuy walks through steps he recommends immediately taking after getting new electronics — like phones or TVs — as gifts this holiday season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A Voice of Their Own: Preserving Personal Identity with Apple's Personal Voice
item.description: Apple's Personal Voice feature lets users create a digital version of their own voice, preserving personal identity and communication despite speech challenges.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Five big events shaped Microsoft’s 2024
item.description: This was an important year for Microsoft: it added approximately a half-trillion dollars to its market valuation and cemented its lead as the world’s leading generative AI (genAI) company.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Japan Airlines was hit by a cyberattack, delaying flights during the year-end holiday season
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japan Airlines said it was hit by a cyberattack Thursday, causing delays to more than 20 domestic flights but the carrier said it was able to stop the onslaught and restore its systems hours later. There was no impact on flight safety, it said.
item.dc:creator: MARI YAMAGUCHI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Undersea power cable linking Finland and Estonia hit by outage, prompting investigation
item.description: FRANKFURT, Germany (AP) — A power cable linking Finland and Estonia under the Baltic Sea suffered an outage, prompting an investigation, Finnish Prime Minister Petteri Orpo said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Chat with Santa or find out if you are on the naughty list with these tech features
item.description: You can access the new (and limited!) Santa Chat feature through the ChatGPT app by starting a new chat, hitting the live chat button.
item.dc:creator: Rich DeMuro, NewsNation
